installation_requirements.separate_120vac_required: Yes, to Post #1 for track lights and track outlets
installation_requirements.electric_and_pneumatic_power: Must be brought into back of lift control console
installation_requirements.pneumatic_power: Responsibility of mechanical contractor to final designated point at vehicle lift
installation_requirements.electrical_connection: Final connection to local/national code is responsibility of electrical contractor
installation_requirements.electrical_note: More than one point of connection may be required. Disconnect switches, main fuses, and main power leads are NOT provided by Mohawk
installation_requirements.track_length_note: Other lengths available; above is not tip-to-tip length
installation_requirements.floor_requirements: Examine floor for flatness; determine shimming needed
installation_requirements.shimming_note: If shimming exceeds 1/2 inch, base plates recommended at $115.00 each (1/2 inch thick); requires longer anchor bolts

specifications.track_configuration: 3 ft wide x 30 ft long tracks (standard)

features: Tracks set at 42 inches inside spread (shown)
Other track lengths and widths available
4 console-lift orientation options (A, B, C, D)

optional_equipment.item: Extra Base Plates for Shimming (1/2 inch thick)
optional_equipment.note: Requires longer anchor bolts to meet embedment depth and specifications

notes: Some option combinations are not available
All lift options checked for purchase must be listed on purchase order as separate line items
Vehicle data forms must be attached for any vehicles to be lifted - fill out for largest, smallest, and lowest underclearance vehicles
Mohawk recommendations are only as good as the data received
Construction project delivery requires advance coordination with Mohawk for production time verification
Truck Data Form (Dual Axle Rear) included - drawing ZZ06 dated 1/95
Truck data form captures: vehicle weight (not GVW), tire diameters, minimum ground clearances, front/side/rear views
Manufacturer: Mohawk Resources Ltd., PO Box 110, Amsterdam, NY 12010
